news.t: VistaShares Adds to its Target 15™ Equity & Income ETF Suite with the Launch of SIOO, the VistaShares Target 15™ S&P 100 Distribution ETF

holdings.infoBox: SIOO is an equity ETF with a total of 119 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 9.27%, First American Government Obligations Fund Class X at 8.87%, Apple at 7.86%, Microsoft at 4.63%, and Broadcom at 4.16%.

overview.description: The VistaShares Target 15 S&P 100 Distribution ETF (SIOO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund seeks income and long-term capital appreciation. The fund is actively managing exposure to US large-cap stocks combined with an option writing strategy. SIOO was launched on Dec 11, 2025 and is issued by VistaShares.

data.title: VistaShares Adds to its Target 15™ Equity & Income ETF Suite with the Launch of SIOO, the VistaShares Target 15™ S&P 100 Distribution ETF
data.text: BOSTON, Dec. 11, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- VistaShares, an innovative asset manager aiming to redefine thematic exposures and income strategies, is today introducing the newest member of its Target 15™...
